meta.title: Anvié — Start living in English
meta.description: Anvié is a premium English-speaking space with speaking practice, community, buddy-system, live feedback and personal growth through real communication.

hero.sub: Anvié is not another school. It's an environment where speaking becomes natural, community becomes home, and English becomes the language of the life you actually want.
hero.caption: Not a course. A new English-speaking life.

problem.lede: Most people already know enough English to start speaking — fear, missing practice, and school-shaped formats are what keep them stuck. Anvié replaces all of it with one thing: an environment.

cards.t: You understand, but freeze when speaking.
cards.b: You know the grammar. You read articles. But the moment a real conversation starts, your tongue forgets the words it knew yesterday.

cards.t: You study, but never actually use it.
cards.b: Apps, courses, textbooks, marathons — and yet English still lives in a separate folder of your brain, not in your daily life.

cards.t: You want confidence, not more grammar stress.
cards.b: What you need isn't another lesson. It's a place where English is the air you breathe — without pressure, judgement, or school flashbacks.

whatis.titleLine: A space where English becomes part of
whatis.intro: Anvié is built like a small private club, not a classroom. Eight integrated elements work together to move English from something you study into something you live.

items.name: Speaking sessions
items.d: Small live groups where you actually talk — not just listen.

items.name: Buddy system
items.d: Paired weekly with another participant for outside-class practice.

items.name: Real-life homework
items.d: Voice tasks tied to your day, not abstract drills.

items.name: Chat practice
items.d: An always-on community chat that runs in English.

items.name: Films & culture
items.d: Real English from movies, songs, slang, idioms — alive language.

items.name: Pronunciation work
items.d: Specific feedback on accent, intonation, melody.

items.name: Personal feedback
items.d: Notes on your voice messages, weekly. From a human.

items.name: Community
items.d: International peers building the same English-speaking life as you.

founder.sig: Anvié is built by a person, not a company.
founder.titleLine1: Created by someone who knows what English
founder.body1Pre: I learned English the way most people do — between apps, podcasts, and quiet evenings rehearsing conversations I would never actually have. Years passed and the language was always
founder.body2: Then I moved abroad, started working with an American mentor, and English stopped being a subject. It became a passport — to friends, to work, to a version of myself I couldn't reach in any other language.
founder.body3: Anvié exists because I want that shift to take less time, and feel like belonging — not like a struggle.

steps.name: Mini-groups
steps.d: Small live circles (4–6 people) where the only way to be in the room is to speak. No hiding behind chat boxes.

steps.name: Buddy system
steps.d: Paired with one participant per cycle for outside-session calls, voice notes, and shared practice goals.

steps.name: Voice homework
steps.d: Short voice tasks tied to your week — your coffee order, your day, your opinion. English in your real life.

steps.name: Personal feedback
steps.d: Human review of your voice messages: pronunciation, melody, the exact word that almost landed. Weekly notes.

steps.name: Culture & real English
steps.d: Films, songs, slang, idioms, the way people actually talk after midnight in a New York bar. Living language, not curriculum.

tariffs.titleLine1: Choose the English environment that matches
tariffs.intro: Five formats, one community. Pick the depth — group practice, mentorship, or full immersion. Every tier shares the same atmosphere; the difference is how close you sit to it.

list.for: For those who want to start speaking regularly and stop learning chaotically.
list.result: Regular practice, first speaking confidence, English becomes part of life.

list.for: For those who want more structure, real practice, and personal feedback.
list.result: Faster growth, better pronunciation, natural understanding of real English.

list.for: For faster progress and personal attention — while staying inside the community.
list.result: Faster results, personal direction, balance of group practice and individual work.

list.for: For those who want personal transformation through English.
list.result: A personal English system built around your lifestyle, taste and goals.

list.for: For a serious goal — relocation, international career, a new level of life.
list.result: Not just learning. Full English-speaking support and deep immersion.

whofor.title: Anvié is
items: You live abroad but still avoid speaking in real life.
You want to travel freely — and not rehearse a sentence in the airport.
You're aiming at an international career or remote-first work.
You're tired of school-like English and ready for something alive.
You want a community — not just a teacher behind a screen.
You want English to feel natural, stylish, and yours.

list.text: I'd done courses for years. After three weeks at Anvié I was speaking — not perfectly, but actually speaking, in real conversations. The buddy system changed everything.
It feels like a small club. The chat runs in English from morning to night and somehow that makes the language not scary anymore.
I expected lessons. I got an environment. After two months I caught myself thinking in English on the metro and laughing about it.
The Elite format is wildly worth it. Daily voice feedback rewires how you actually sound — not how you look on paper.

finalcta.titleLine1: Choose the English environment that matches
finalcta.sub: Apply and we'll help you pick the format that fits your goals, your lifestyle, and your current level. Every application is read personally.
finalcta.contactMembers: Members across EU, UK, US, AE
finalcta.placeholderProblem: What blocks you most right now?
finalcta.successP: We'll write back within 24 hours to find the right format for you. — A.

footer.tag: A premium English-speaking space. Live conversation, real community, a language that actually becomes part of your life.
footer.made: Made with attention · Berlin · Lisbon · NYC
